title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash
summary: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, has died at age 69. Guillemot was one of five brothers who founded the influential video game publisher.
content: Claude Guillemot, who founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, has died at the age of 69.

zh.title: 育碧联合创始人克劳德·吉耶莫在飞机坠毁中丧生
zh.summary: 育碧联合创始人克劳德·吉耶莫去世，享年69岁。吉耶莫是创办这家极具影响力的电子游戏发行商的五兄弟之一。

title: Cold Court’s debut EP is an infectious, glitchy genre mashup
summary: Cold Court, a Philly-based brother-sister duo, released their debut EP blending hyperpop, dance punk, and emo influences. The band takes a more self-serious approach to glitchy genre mashups than comparable contemporary acts.
content:
Cold Court is a brother-sister duo from Philly that seems to love nothing more than shoving all of their influences together in a messy soup that at least superficially resembles the hyperpop you've come to expect from acts like 100 Gecs. But, where songs like "Dumbest Girl Alive" goofily wink at pop punk and emo, Cold Court are a bit more self-serious, and that's not necessarily a bad thing. 
The opening track on the band's debut EP \ (^_^) / (aka Hands Up), "Nina", starts off sounding not unlike the dance punk bands that stormed the scene in the mid aughts like Franz Ferdinand or Test Icicles. But that all starts to change about a minute  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Cold Court首张EP是一张充满感染力的、故障风格的音乐混搭
zh.summary: Cold Court是一个来自费城的兄妹乐队二人组，发布了融合超级流行、舞蹈朋克和情感摇滚风格的首张EP。与类似的当代乐队相比，该乐队对故障风格混搭采取了更加严肃认真的态度。

title: Polymarket reportedly paid creators to post deceptive videos about fake bets
summary: Polymarket allegedly paid creators to film deceptive videos on counterfeit versions of the platform, featuring fake trades and non-existent winnings. The campaign aimed to create social media content that appeared authentic.
content: Many of those videos were reportedly filmed on “near-perfect copies” of the Polymarket website, while featuring trades and winnings that were not real.

zh.title: 据报道，Polymarket向创作者支付费用以发布虚假投注的欺骗性视频
zh.summary: 据称Polymarket向创作者支付费用，在该平台的伪造版本上拍摄欺骗性视频，展示虚假交易和不存在的收益。该活动旨在制作看起来真实的社交媒体内容。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: A new robotaxi scorecard shows China’s dominance
summary: A new robotaxi scorecard reveals China's dominant position in autonomous vehicle development and deployment. The analysis highlights competitive advantages in the transportation technology sector.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility：新的机器人出租车评分卡显示中国的主导地位
zh.summary: 一份新的机器人出租车评分卡揭示了中国在自动驾驶汽车开发和部署中的主导地位。该分析突出了运输技术领域的竞争优势。

title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
summary: A TechCrunch Equity podcast episode examines the Trump administration's recent enforcement actions against Anthropic and their potential implications for the AI industry ecosystem.
content: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.

zh.title: 当特朗普政府打击Anthropic时，谁将受益？
zh.summary: TechCrunch Equity播客节目审视了特朗普政府对Anthropic的最近执法行动及其对人工智能产业生态系统的潜在影响。

title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
summary: Apple's iOS 27 introduces practical AI features across the operating system beyond Siri's redesign, enhancing user productivity with integrated intelligence tools.
content: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.

zh.title: 超越Siri：iOS 27为您的iPhone带来的实用AI功能
zh.summary: Apple的iOS 27在操作系统中引入了实用的AI功能，超越了Siri的重新设计，通过集成智能工具增强用户生产力。

title: Polymarket reportedly paid people to post fake videos of themselves placing bets
summary: A Wall Street Journal investigation found that Polymarket paid over 1,100 creators to film deceptive videos showing fake bets and wins on social media. The fraudulent clips contained subtle indicators revealing their inauthenticity.
content:
According to a Wall Street Journal investigation, Polymarket has been paying people to film themselves placing fake bets and celebrating fake wins on social media. WSJ identified over 1,100 deceptive clips and talked to creators who, despite not stating as such in their videos, confirmed the company paid them to create the clips.
The videos posted on social media look legit at first, but there are subtle clues that betray them as fraudulent. For instance, when examined closely, one clip shows someone visiting "poiymarket.com" rather than polymarket.com. According to the Journal's investigation, none of the bets placed in the over 1,100 vide …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报Polymarket支付报酬让人发布虚假下注视频
zh.summary: 华尔街日报的调查发现，Polymarket向超过1100名创作者支付报酬，让他们制作欺骗性视频，在社交媒体上展示虚假下注和获胜。这些欺诈视频包含微妙的指标，暴露了其虚假本质。

title: How Roomba started a robot revolution
summary: Roomba, the simple robot vacuum that bumped around homes semi-randomly, became a beloved consumer product and sparked the home robotics revolution through accessible design and personality. The Verge's documentary traces the origin story with co-founder Colin Angle, exploring how the product overcame functional limitations through emotional connection. The story illustrates how consumer affinity and relatability can drive technological adoption beyond mere technical superiority.
content:
If you had a Roomba, especially in the early days of the robot vacuum, it was in many ways a fairly unsophisticated machine. It would just bump around your house, looking for something to suck up, until its battery died or its (way too small) tank filled up. Not that it mattered, though. You probably loved your Roomba. You probably gave it a name.
On this episode of Version History, we tell the story of the Roomba, and how it made vacuums lovable. The Verge's David Pierce and Jennifer Pattison Tuohy are joined by iRobot's co-founder and former CEO Colin Angle to trace the robovac revolution back to its origins, with a group of engineers try …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roomba如何引发了机器人革命
zh.summary: Roomba是一款简单的扫地机器人，在家中半随机地移动，通过易用的设计和个性化特征成为了深受喜爱的消费产品，并引发了家用机器人革命。The Verge的纪录片追踪了创始人Colin Angle的创业故事，探讨了这款产品如何通过情感连接克服功能限制。这个故事说明了消费者的亲和力和相关性如何能够推动技术采用超越单纯的技术优越性。

title: Electric air taxis are stuck in the courtroom
summary: Legal battles between leading electric air taxi companies Joby and Archer—including accusations of corporate espionage and concealed Chinese ties—have shifted industry focus from innovation to courtrooms. Additional patent litigation between competitors further threatens the path toward commercial deployment. These disputes risk delaying the development of electric aviation technology amid regulatory uncertainty.
content:
Joby flight at JFK airport. | Image: The Verge	

This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on aviation, air taxis, and Wi-Fi speeds at 30,000 feet, follow Andrew J. Hawkins. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sunday at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Last year, two of the leading air taxi companies in the US, Joby Aviation and Archer Aviation, sued each other, with Joby accusing Archer of corporate espionage and Archer claiming that Joby was concealing its ties to China. Then, in February of this year, Archer filed a patent infringement suit against a different air taxi rival, Vertical A …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 电动空中出租车陷入法庭诉讼
zh.summary: 领先的电动空中出租车公司Joby和Archer之间的法律纠纷——包括企业间谍指控和隐瞒的中国联系——已经将行业的焦点从创新转向法庭。竞争对手之间的额外专利诉讼进一步威胁了商业部署的前景。这些纠纷有可能在监管不确定性的背景下延缓电动航空技术的发展。

title: Sony’s Xperia 1 VIII is still a phone for the fans
summary: Sony's flagship Xperia 1 VIII undergoes significant design and camera changes, dropping the signature continuous optical zoom while retaining premium features like the headphone jack and microSD slot. Priced at £1,399/€1,499 and unavailable in the US, the device targets enthusiast users willing to pay for differentiation. The redesign reflects Sony's strategic repositioning around niche, premium market segments.
content:
The 1 VIII doesn’t look much like any Xperia that’s come before.	

The Xperia 1 VIII marks an attempt at a step change for Sony's flagship phone line. Not only has it had an aesthetic overhaul, but Sony has also revamped the camera system, dropping the continuous optical zoom telephoto that's defined the last four generations of Xperia phone. 
It's not all different. Sony staples like a 3.5mm headphone jack and microSD card slot remain, and a few specific design touches, like a thick front bezel that fits stereo speakers, have stayed intact. Sony's ambitious pricing hasn't changed either: The Xperia 1 VIII isn't launching in the US, but in the UK and Europe, it starts from £1,399 / €1,499 (about $1,850), r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼Xperia 1 VIII仍然是为粉丝打造的手机
zh.summary: 索尼旗舰手机Xperia 1 VIII进行了重大的设计和摄像头改进，放弃了标志性的连续光学变焦，但保留了耳机插孔和microSD卡槽等高端功能。定价为£1,399/€1,499，在美国无法购买，该设备针对愿意为差异化功能付费的发烧友用户。这一重新设计反映了索尼围绕利基、高端市场细分的战略重新定位。

title: Review: Widow's Bay is a boldly original take on comedic horror
summary: Widow's Bay delivers comedic horror that honors genre classics while reimagining familiar tropes through surprise and originality. The series offers binge-worthy entertainment that balances respect for horror conventions with creative subversion of expectations. The approach demonstrates how infusing humor and fresh perspectives into established genres creates compelling viewing experiences.
content: An eminently binge-able series that honors classic horror tropes while reinventing them in surprising ways

zh.title: 评论：寡妇湾对喜剧恐怖的大胆原创诠释
zh.summary: 《寡妇湾》呈现喜剧恐怖作品，既尊重经典类型作品，又通过惊喜和原创性重新诠释熟悉的套路。该系列提供值得一口气看完的娱乐内容，平衡了对恐怖公约的尊重与创意颠覆预期。这种方法展示了如何将幽默和新鲜视角融入既有类型作品中，创作出引人入胜的观看体验。
